ignore.reason: Duplicate bridgehead selectors intentionally override the SE base style.
This edition replaces the Standard Ebooks title wordmark (titlepage.svg) with the new cover art, so there is no titlepage SVG whose title must match the cover SVG.

The uncopyright is intentionally customized for this derivative edition: it notes that the cover image is not dedicated to the public domain, drops the public-domain claims over artwork, and replaces the Standard Ebooks representations line with the editor's, so it no longer matches the SE boilerplate template.
De-branded fork: the Standard Ebooks publisher logo (images/logo.svg) has been removed intentionally, and LICENSE.md lives at the repository root rather than inside the SE project directory.
